upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra parvARi jAtavedaH SfRIhi' (f0 10875) praSfRIhi CindDi praSabdaH praviveke pArTakye
'parA SfRIhi tapasA yAtuDAnAn parA'gne rakzo harasA SfRIhi parArcizA muradevAY CfRIhi parAsutfpaH SoSucataH SfRIhi' (aTarva॰8.3.13).. iha sarvatra parASabdo viSaraRasya hiMsanasya kArtsnyamAha
'parASfRItamacito nyozatam' (f॰7.104.1) ukto'rTaH parASara ityfzinAmaDeyam atrApi paretyupasargaH parASfRAtIti parASaraH pacAdyac
'indro vo'dya parASarIt' (aTarva॰3.66.2) parASarIditi luNi rUpam vfdDyaBAvaSCAndasaH
'sa ᳫ hEna ᳫ SfRAti' (Sa0 brA0 11118) samyag hinastItyarTaH
'tamaBipadya treDA samaSfRan' (jE0 brA0 197) samaSfRan vyaSasan vyakfntan
'saM vE gururBAH SfRAti' (E0 brA0 413) saMSfRAti hinasti kziRoti
'sarvezAM mUrDni vA tizWet viSIryeta vane'TavA' (hitopa0 1113) viSIryeta mlAnaM sadaDaH patet
'mA taRqulaM viSarIrdevayantam' (aTarva0 12318) mA viSarIH=mA viSArIH mA KaRqaSaH kArzIrityarTaH
'ni SfRIhyAbADaM yo no asti' (tE0 brA0 2473) nitarAM SIrRaM kuru
